description: Extracts keyword(s) value(s) from a Flow Cytometry Standard (FCS) file.
author: Josef Spidlen, BC Cancer Agency
plan:
## ExtractFCSKeywords GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
ExtractFCSKeywords is a GenePattern module that Extracts keyword(s) value(s) from a Flow Cytometry Standard (FCS) file.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 3 parameters:
- Required: Input.FCS.data.file, Keywords.output.mode, Keywords.output.file.name
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -jar <libdir>extractfcskeywords.jar <Input.FCS.data.file> <Keywords.output.file.name> <Keywords.output.mode>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: Input.FCS.data.file
parameters.description: The input FCS data file from which the module will extract keyword/value pairs.

parameters.name: Keywords.output.mode
parameters.description: The file format to be used to store the extracted keywords/value pairs.

choices.display: Text file with FCS text segment chunk

parameters.name: Keywords.output.file.name
parameters.description: The name for the file in which the keyword/value pairs are stored.
